supersedes.supersededReason: Codex P1 #15 — gatedSwap recomputes the calldata hash as keccak256(abi.encode(payer, tokenIn, amountIn, urCalldata)) instead of keccak256(urCalldata). v2 only bound the UR shape, leaving room for a front-runner to replay a leaked attestation+sig with a larger amountIn (router would over-pull from att.swapper while UR consumed only the original encoded amount, stranding the excess and burning the nonce). Off-chain orchestrator + attestation interface mirror the new encoding; oracle is unchanged because it just echoes the caller-supplied hash. New hashing logic = new bytecode = new CREATE2 address.

history.supersededReason: TRU-86 v2 — added (payer, tokenIn, amountIn) args + Permit2/UR pre-approvals so ERC20-input swaps work.
Codex P1 #15 — bind pull params into attestation hash.
